method: Independent exact-commit production graph, API, persistence, contract, browser readback, and evidence audit with all required suites rerun.

reruns.note: Build emitted only pre-existing Autoprefixer warnings in unrelated CSS.

reruns.command: python3 -m pytest -m not_requires_live_env <20 completion-summary backend files>
reruns.note: The 14 deselections are repository-marker live PostgreSQL cases (13 schema, 1 snapshots), not runtime skips or failures. Warning is the Starlette/httpx deprecation.
review_target is intentionally not evaluated outside formal review.

A-COMMIT.description: Exact target and branch verified before and after acceptance.

A-CORE-E2E.description: Real production Next/API/worker browser closure, 23/23 with no skip/fixme.

A-COVERAGE-E2E.description: Supplemental real-runtime browser/API/persistence readbacks, 6/6 with no fail/skip/fixme/flaky/retry.

A-WEB.description: Web Vitest 213/213 and web TypeScript check.

A-BUILD.description: Production Next build and emitted route manifest.

A-CLIENT.description: Generated OpenAPI client Vitest 5/5 and client TypeScript check.

A-BACKEND.description: Completion-summary backend contract/integration/unit selection: 182 passed, 14 live-PostgreSQL-marker deselected, zero fail/skip.

A-VALIDATORS.description: Canonical design and OpenAPI composition validators passed.

A-ROUTE-GRAPH.description: Mounted production route/import/API graph inspected, including durable intake, existing Listing, typed client, API router, worker, and AppShell composition.

A-PERSISTENCE.description: Persisted effects, transactions, merge/replay behavior, restart readback, and concurrency/failure paths inspected and rerun.

A-DESIGN.description: Package 10 source/checksums, Review 003 truthfulness, responsive/accessibility conditions, and design validator inspected.

A-ACCEPTANCE.description: Independent Fleet exact-commit report and complete 197-row machine result.

residual_notes: Review 003 remains truthfully APPROVED_WITH_CONDITIONS and explicitly does not impersonate missing discipline approvals. FTR-181 tests that truthfulness; release-process approvals are outside this functional acceptance disposition.
Four unrelated pre-existing Autoprefixer warnings remain informational; they did not fail typecheck or production build.

rows.source_requirement: Complete Assisted Intake from Inbox through audit evidence is implemented in Expansion Workspace.
source_fields: Complete Assisted Intake from Inbox through audit evidence is implemented in Expansion Workspace.
All routes and six core flows complete from production AppShell.
rows.rationale: PASS: Exact-commit production/evidence inspection and required reruns confirm the integration claim: Core 23/23 and coverage 6/6 complete routes, six flows and readbacks.

source_fields: Desktop, tablet, and mobile compositions are production reachable.
